Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class IObservableProperty

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.IObservableProperty
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    IAncCapability, IAudiodoTransparencyCapability, IAudiosphereIrCapability, IBassBoostCapability, IBatteryCapability, IDetailEnhancerCapability, IDeviceInfoCapability, IEqualizerCapability, IHeadTrackCapability, IProfileCapability, IProfileService, ISpatializerCapability, IVolumeCapability
    public class IObservableProperty
extends java.lang.Object
    The observable interface

    The interface that any observable class must implement.
